'''Dal Perhi''' was a short [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]]. He was muscular, with a braid running down his back, and he worked as a representative of [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] prior to the [[Battle of Naboo/Legends|Battle of Naboo]]. Two years after the Battle of Naboo, he became [[Vigo/Legends|Vigo]]. He later became the underlord of Black Sun, the highest position attainable in the organization.

==Behind the scenes==
''[[Darth Maul: Shadow Hunter]]'' introduced a Black Sun officer named Dal Perhi, while ''[[Evasive Action: Prey]]'', set over a decade later, refers to a Black Sun leader named Perhi. [[Leland Chee]] has confirmed they are the same person.<ref>{{SWBoards|url=thread.jspa?threadID=152583&start=1095#16069962|thread=Holocron continuity database questions|user=[[Leland Chee|Tasty Taste]]|date=2006-12-20|time=12:09 AM}}</ref>
